description: getenv flows directly to system() call — classic command injection. Safe version uses allowlist comparison.

expected.notes: getenv("USER_CMD") flows directly into system(cmd) without sanitization
AST pattern still fires on system() in safe version — pattern is syntactic
TP: getenv at line 11 flows to system(cmd) at line 14 in run_safe — scanner does not model strcmp as a validator, so the allowlist check does not sanitize. Exactly one finding after dedup.
Safe version with strcmp allowlist — ideally suppressed but scanner may not model strcmp as validation
